title: Back to Bed
description: Makes your adventures more comfortable and secure by providing an easy way to return to your bed.
body:
> Introduces **Returners** — magical items that let you teleport back to your bed with ease. Whether you're lost in the Overworld, stranded in the Nether, or stuck in the End, these tools help you return home safely.

---

## 📘 Wiki

Want more details about Returner items, configuration tips, or mod mechanics?  
Visit the [**Back To Bed Wiki**](https://github.com/BaKYCoder/back-to-bed/wiki) for complete documentation.

---

## 🛠️ Configuration

As of **v1.2+**, all Returners can be customized individually or globally.

**Config file location:**
- **Fabric:** `config/backtobed.json`
- **Forge / NeoForge:** `config/backtobed-common.toml`

> 📦 Requires [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) **v1.5.6+** on Fabric

---

## 🌍 Supported Languages

- 🇺🇸 English, 🇩🇪 German, 🇫🇷 French, 🇨🇿 Czech
<details>
<summary>More languages</summary>

- 🇺🇦 Ukrainian, 🇪🇸 Spanish, 🇮🇹 Italian, 🇵🇱 Polish, 🇷🇺 Russian
</details>

---

Found a bug? Want to help translate or suggest a feature?
